notes: Review on dietary carbohydrates and intestinal homeostasis; valuable for gut-barrier and microbiome mechanisms but scope is narrow (GI, not mortality/CVD outcomes). Keep as mechanistic reference.
Consumer health article, not peer-reviewed primary research. Claims are supported by stronger primary literature.

Huang et al. 2023, Nutrition; total sugar/added sugar/fructose/sucrose and all-cause + CVD mortality; systematic review + dose-response meta-analysis; total sugars RR 1.09 all-cause, 1.10 CVD mortality

Li et al. 2023, Frontiers in Nutrition; SSBs + ASBs + fruit juices and CVD/mortality meta-analysis; dose-response: SSBs monotonically associated with T2D, CHD, stroke, and all-cause mortality (RR 1.08–1.54)
